payload.name: mux2_formula
payload.description: Multiplexer decomposition: use AND/OR/NOT primitives, not a direct lookup.
payload.formula: mux2(s, a, b) = (s AND a) OR (NOT s AND b)

payload.name: majority3_formula
payload.formula: majority3(a, b, c) = (a AND b) OR (b AND c) OR (a AND c)

payload.name: parity3_formula
payload.formula: parity3(a, b, c) = a XOR b XOR c

payload.name: full_adder_formula
payload.description: Full adder sum/carry from half-adder primitives or XOR/AND/OR.
payload.formula: full_adder_sum(a, b, cin) = a XOR b XOR cin  |  full_adder_carry(a, b, cin) = (a AND b) OR (cin AND (a XOR b))

payload.name: xor_chain4_formula
payload.formula: xor_chain4(a,b,c,d) = a XOR b XOR c XOR d
